examples: I had to admit it sounded like an implausible excuse.
One of the debated cures for this labor shortage remains as implausible as it's been all along: Native workers won't be returning to the farm.
The idea of westerners coming in to help run Russian cities, or even whole regions, still seems implausible.
She says it's implausible that the drugs would have no fracture effect on women with osteopenia.
